automations.title: Morning Control Panel
automations.closeout: Commit tracked morning artifacts, update memory when durable state changes, and post one concise status update when configured.

automations.title: Chat Intake And Action Turn
automations.closeout: Reply in the originating thread for acted-on items and end quietly when nothing actionable exists.

automations.title: External Feed Digest
automations.closeout: Post or save a deduped digest and update source-ID memory.

automations.title: Opportunity Planning Refresh
automations.closeout: Verify official dates before posting and record changed priorities.

automations.title: System Review Loop
automations.closeout: Report what changed, what was learned, and what needs an operator decision.

automations.title: Operations Checklist Scan
automations.closeout: Update checklist only from clear completion evidence and report ambiguities.

automations.title: Workspace Backup
automations.closeout: Verify required paths at the destination and report failures explicitly.

automations.title: Receipt Packet Assembly
automations.closeout: Keep private packet evidence out of git and record only non-sensitive memory.

automations.title: Chat File Intake
automations.closeout: Preserve source bytes, require metadata, and create a task draft when the package remains incomplete.
